magic_missile.name: Magic Missile
magic_missile.description: A quick spell that fires a bolt of energy at a random enemy.

chain_lightning.name: Chain Lightning
chain_lightning.description: A powerful spell that hit randomly multiple enemies, with a possibility to stun them.

blizzard.name: Blizzard
blizzard.description: Summon a mighty storm that repeatedly hit enemies and slow them.

fireball.name: Fireball
fireball.description: Hurl a blazing fireball that explodes on impact, scorching multiple enemies within its area.

burning_ray.name: Burning Ray
burning_ray.description: Release a horizontal beam of fire that burns enemies over time. Useful for hitting groups in a line.

righteous_fire.name: Righteous Fire
righteous_fire.description: Remove your pants and burn everything, including yourself.

poison_cloud.name: Poison Cloud
poison_cloud.description: Summon a toxic cloud that poisons all enemies in its area, dealing damage over time.

irradiate.name: Irradiate
irradiate.description: Unleashes a vertical column of volatile energy, dealing Storm damage on impact and inflicting Poison over time..

voodoo_doll.name: Voodoo Doll
voodoo_doll.description: Stab your Voodoo Doll to inflict physical pain to all enemies.

curse_frailty.name: Curse of Frailty
curse_frailty.description: Curse enemies to weaken their defenses, making them take more damage from physical damage.

curse_conductivity.name: Curse of Conductivity
curse_conductivity.description: Curse your foes with the storm's fury, making their bodies living conduits that draw lightning to strike all around them, and trigger a Maelstrom in case of critical hit.

curse_putridity.name: Curse of Putridity
curse_putridity.description: Curse your foes with the rot, making their bodies crumble.

curse_flammability.name: Curse of Flammability
curse_flammability.description: Unleash infernal flames upon your enemies, intensifying the fire damage they suffer the longer they burn.

Trigger.name: Curse of Flammability
Trigger.description: Trigger an Intense Fire that deals additional Fire Damage equal to 30% of the Hit's Fire Damage for each Stack of Burn present on the target.

curse_weakness.name: Curse of Weakness
curse_weakness.description: A debilitating curse that reduces enemies' damage output.

curse_clumsy.name: Curse of Clumsiness
curse_clumsy.description: A crippling curse that hinders enemies ability to evade or block your attacks.

curse_vampirism.name: Curse of Vampirism
curse_vampirism.description: A dark curse that binds the enemy's lifeblood to your strikes, so that every blow siphons vitality back into your veins.

blessing_haste.name: Blessing of Haste
blessing_haste.description: A blessing that increases your speed, allowing quicker actions in battle.

blessing_crit.name: Blessing of Precision
blessing_crit.description: A blessing that increase your chance of critical strike, and make them stronger.

blessing_protection.name: Blessing of Protection
blessing_protection.description: A blessing that massively increase your defense.

poison_coating.name: Poison Coating
poison_coating.description: Coat your weapon with venom, causing your attacks to inflict poison damage over time.

pyroclastic_infusion.name: Pyroclastic Infusion
pyroclastic_infusion.description: Infuse your weapon with the power of Fire and Storm.

sharpen_weapon.name: Sharpen Weapon
sharpen_weapon.description: Sharpen your weapon, making it likely to bleed your foes.

heal.name: Heal
heal.description: Restore a portion of your life with this simple yet effective healing spell.

blessing_heal.name: Blessing of Renewal
blessing_heal.description: A blessing that increase your life regeneration.

meditate.name: Meditate
meditate.description: Focus your mind to recover mana, replenishing your magical energy.

retaliate.name: Retaliate
retaliate.description: A defensive technique that punishes enemies when you block or evade their attacks.

shield_bash.name: Shield Bash
shield_bash.description: Slams the target with your shield, dealing damage based on your equipped shield's Armor.

double_strike.name: Double Strike
double_strike.description: A second, slightly slower strike with your weapon.

whirlwind.name: Whirlwind
whirlwind.description: Spin with your two-handed melee weapon, repeatedly striking nearby enemies for 70% of your base weapon damage each hit.

rain_arrows.name: Rain of Arrows
rain_arrows.description: Fire multiple times your ranged weapon toward the sky, repeatedly striking enemies for 30% of your base weapon damage each hit.
